MINI MINUTES: PETITIONER NCO PORTFOLIO MANAGEMENT, INC.'S Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award.
RULING: No appearance on this matter. Moving party did not present a valid proof of service as requested in the tentative ruling, therefore the Court denied the petition to confirm arbitration award. (301/HEK/) Judge: Harold E. Kahn, Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR #7077
